creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Mon Jul 30 19:10:52 2012
New Revision: 301739
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301739

Log:
  - Update to 2012.07
  
  Changelog:	http://rakudo.org/2012/07/28/rakudo-star-2012-07-released/
  PR:		ports/170277
  Submitted by:	Aliaksandr Zahatski <zahatski@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/lang/rakudo/Makefile
  head/lang/rakudo/distinfo
  head/lang/rakudo/pkg-plist

Modified: head/lang/rakudo/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/rakudo/Makefile	Mon Jul 30 18:54:25 2012	(r301738)
+++ head/lang/rakudo/Makefile	Mon Jul 30 19:10:52 2012	(r301739)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	rakudo
-PORTVERSION=	2012.05
+PORTVERSION=	2012.07
 PORTEPOCH=	3
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cloud.github.com/downloads/rakudo/star/
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	icudata:${PORTSDIR}/devel/i
 
 CONFLICTS=	parrot-[0-9]*
 
-PARROT_VERSION=4.4.0
+PARROT_VERSION=4.6.0
 INSTALL_TARGET=	install
 CONFIGURE_SCRIPT=	Configure.pl
 CONFIGURE_PARROT_ARGS=	--cc=${CC} --cxx=${CXX} --ld=${CC} --ccflags="${CFLAGS}" \
@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ do-build:
 do-install:
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/parrot-${PARROT_VERSION} \
 	&& ${MAKE} install-dev PREFIX=${PREFIX} \
-	&& cd ${WRKSRC}/nqp-2012.05 \
+	&& cd ${WRKSRC}/nqp-2012.07 \
 	&& ${PERL} ${CONFIGURE_SCRIPT} --with-parrot=${PREFIX}/bin/parrot \
 					--prefix=${PREFIX} \
 	&& ${MAKE} install PREFIX=${PREFIX} \

Modified: head/lang/rakudo/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/rakudo/distinfo	Mon Jul 30 18:54:25 2012	(r301738)
+++ head/lang/rakudo/distinfo	Mon Jul 30 19:10:52 2012	(r301739)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rakudo-star-2012.05.tar.gz) = 4bb1cee56e28e2c26948eefe1ae141373191b9b8cff334baa5aa295382e02b9a
-SIZE (rakudo-star-2012.05.tar.gz) = 8055654
+SHA256 (rakudo-star-2012.07.tar.gz) = 684cb3bb1f8fb95be10fae8d778dec41082e8f5d617aa99e919210e70b7e1b3d
+SIZE (rakudo-star-2012.07.tar.gz) = 7064626
